en: There must be someone. Sally found someone.
ko: 멋진 독신 남자들. 누군가는 있을 거야. 샐리가 누군가를 찾았어.

en: Well, Sally got the last good one. Joe and I broke up.
ko: 글쎄, 샐리가 마지막 좋은 남자를 잡았네. 조와 나는 헤어졌어.

en: What? When? Monday. You waited three days to tell us?
ko: 뭐? 언제? 월요일. 우리한테 말하는 데 3일이나 기다렸어?

en: When Joe was available? For God's sakes, Marie, don't you have any feelings about this?
She's obviously upset. I'm not that upset. We've been growing apart for quite a while.
ko: 세상에 마리, 이것에 대해 감정이 없어? 분명히 속상하잖아. 그렇게 속상하진 않아. 우리 사이가 멀어진 거

en: But you guys were a couple. You had someone to go places with.
ko: 하지만 너희는 커플이었잖아. 함께 갈 사람이 있었고. 공휴일에 데이트도 했잖아.

en: You had a date on national holidays. I said to myself, you deserve more than this.
You're 31 years old. And the clock is ticking.
ko: 너는 31살이야. 그리고 시간은 흘러가고 있어. 아니, 36세가 되어야 진짜로 시작돼.

en: No, the clock doesn't really start to tick until you're 36.
God, you're in such great shape.
ko: 글쎄, 며칠 동안 적응할 시간이 있었고, 괜찮아.

en: Well, I've had a few days to get used to it, and I feel okay.
ko: 글쎄, 며칠 동안 적응할 시간이 있었고, 괜찮아.

en: Good. Then you're ready. Really, Marie?
Well, how else do you think you'd do it? I've got the perfect guy.
ko: 정말로, 마리? 그럼 어떻게 할 거라고 생각해?

en: I don't happen to find him attractive, but you might.
ko: 하지만 넌 그럴 수도 있어. 그녀는 턱 문제는 없어

en: She doesn't have a problem with chins. Marie, I'm not ready yet.
ko: 하지만 넌 그럴 수도 있어. 그녀는 턱 문제는 없어

en: But you just said you were over him. I am over him, but I'm in a mourning period.
ko: 너 방금 그를 잊었다고 했잖아. 나는 그를 잊었지만, 지금은 애도 기간이야.
